title: 可穿戴初创公司 CUDIS 推出了新的健康环系列，配备人工智能“教练”
content: 可穿戴设备通过可兑换健康产品的积分来激励健康行为。
original_title: Wearable startup CUDIS launches a new health ring line with an AI-fueled ‘coach’
original_content: The wearable incentivizes healthy behavior with points that can be redeemed for health products.

title: OpenClaw 创建者对 AI 构建者的建议是要更加有趣，并给自己时间来改进
content: Peter Steinberger 谈论了他的病毒式 AI 代理 OpenClaw 的创建，以及如何变得更加“有趣”以更好地学习 AI 编码。
original_title: OpenClaw creator’s advice to AI builders is to be more playful and allow yourself time to improve
original_content: Peter Steinberger talks about the creation of his viral AI agent OpenClaw and how being more "playful" makes for a better way to learn AI coding.

title: 美国要求外交官游说反对外国数据主权法
content: 特朗普政府已下令美国外交官游说各国，反对各国试图监管美国科技公司处理外国人数据的行为。
original_title: US tells diplomats to lobby against foreign data sovereignty laws
original_content: The Trump administration has ordered U.S. diplomats to lobby against countries' attempts to regulate how American tech companies handle foreigners' data.

title: 据称 OpenClaw 用户正在绕过反机器人系统
content: 一个名为 Scrapling 的开源项目正在吸引人工智能代理用户，他们希望他们的机器人在未经许可的情况下抓取网站。
original_title: OpenClaw Users Are Allegedly Bypassing Anti-Bot Systems
original_content: An open source project called Scrapling is gaining traction with AI agent users who want their bots to scrape sites without permission.

title: 在 Meta 挖走计算机应用人工智能初创公司 Vercept 创始人之一后，Anthropic 收购了该公司
content: 总部位于西雅图的 Vercept 开发了复杂的代理工具，包括一个计算机使用代理，可以像使用笔记本电脑的人一样完成应用程序内的任务。
original_title: Anthropic acquires computer-use AI startup Vercept after Meta poached one of its founders
original_content: Seattle-based Vercept developed complex agentic tools, including a computer-use agent that could complete tasks inside applications like a person with a laptop would.

title: 公众对人工智能基础设施的反对正在升温
content: 公众对数据中心繁荣的强烈反对导致了各种严厉的政策——包括禁止新建数据中心。
original_title: The public opposition to AI infrastructure is heating up
original_content: Public backlash over the data center boom is leading to a variety of draconian policies — including bans on new construction.

title: 从约会诈骗到假律师：OpenAI 详细介绍了新威胁报告中的 ChatGPT 滥用情况
content: 2 月 25 日路透社 - OpenAI 表示，它禁止与中国执法部门、浪漫诈骗者和影响力活动有关的账户，包括针对日本第一位女首相的抹黑活动。
original_title: From Dating Scams to Fake Lawyers: OpenAI Details ChatGPT Misuse in New Threat Report
